orms.label: Prisma ORM
orms.description: Schema-first ORM with type-safe auto-generated client (v7.x)

databases.label: PostgreSQL
nextSteps: Run `npx prisma migrate dev --name init` to apply the schema
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService wherever you need database access

databases.label: MySQL
nextSteps: Run `npx prisma migrate dev --name init` to apply the schema
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService wherever you need database access

databases.label: SQLite
nextSteps: Run `npx prisma migrate dev --name init` to apply the schema
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService wherever you need database access

databases.label: PostgreSQL
nextSteps: Run `npx drizzle-kit push` to sync the schema to your database
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService and call `.getDb()` to use the drizzle query builder

databases.label: MySQL
nextSteps: Run `npx drizzle-kit push` to sync the schema to your database
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService and call `.getDb()` to use the drizzle query builder

databases.label: SQLite
nextSteps: Run `npx drizzle-kit push` to sync the schema to your database
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService and call `.getDb()` to use the drizzle query builder

orms.label: TypeORM
orms.description: Decorator-based ORM with Active Record / Data Mapper patterns

databases.label: PostgreSQL
nextSteps: With synchronize:true, tables are created automatically on first boot
For production, set synchronize:false and manage migrations with TypeORM CLI
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService and use `.dataSource.getRepository(User)` for queries
Add `import "reflect-metadata";` as the first line of your src/main.ts

databases.label: MySQL
nextSteps: With synchronize:true, tables are created automatically on first boot
For production, set synchronize:false and manage migrations with TypeORM CLI
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService and use `.dataSource.getRepository(User)` for queries
Add `import "reflect-metadata";` as the first line of your src/main.ts

nextSteps: With synchronize:true, tables are created automatically on first boot
For production, set synchronize:false and manage migrations with TypeORM CLI
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array

Add `import "reflect-metadata";` as the first line of your src/main.ts

orms.label: Mongoose
orms.description: Elegant MongoDB object modeling for Node.js

databases.label: MongoDB
nextSteps: Set DATABASE_URL to your MongoDB connection string (mongodb+srv://...)
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Import UserModel from the schema file and use it directly for CRUD operations

orms.label: MikroORM
orms.description: TypeScript ORM based on Data Mapper, Unit of Work, and Identity Map

databases.label: PostgreSQL
nextSteps: Run `npx mikro-orm migration:create --initial` to generate your first migration
Run `npx mikro-orm migration:up` to apply pending migrations
Import the generated module in your AppModule imports array
Inject DatabaseService and use `.em` to get a forked EntityManager for queries
